calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-22-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Dept. 501 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6048. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Omar Vaquero, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation.
Ike Okwuosa, Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Ervin Escobar.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on December 7, 2018.
Defendant Ervin Escobar's answer to plaintiff's complaint was filed December 18, 2018.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was served on January 7, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed today, January 22, 2019.

The following exhibits were submitted to the Court for review by plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation:

Exhibit 1: Copy of the Crosby Lease Agreement signed 7/27/16..........................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Three-Day Notice to Pay Rent or Quit with Proof of Service dated 11/28/18..ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation, and against defendant Ervin Escobar, as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $848.00.
Holdover Damages - $530.00.
Costs - $415.00.
Total: $1,793.00.

Additionally, plaintiff Caristas Management Corporation is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 516 O'Farrell Street, Unit #316, San Francisco, CA 94102.

The Lease is Forfeited.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Counsel STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jan-22-2019 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-16-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Charles F. Haines; Clerk: N. Wong; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Caritas Management is present. Represented by
Attorney Francisco Torres appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Ervin Escobar is NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of January 22, 2019 remains on calendar.
